items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an identity handoff audit trail.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an 'Identity handoff audit trail' but did not provide any concrete evidence confirming its existence. The linked use case specifies the need for this audit trail, yet the prior steps do not include any details or evidence related to it. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no supporting evidence to confirm the requirement's satisfaction.
